policy.no_guessing: Rows in this report remain blank unless an official B3 taxonomy or reviewed issuer source maps the exact listing to a canonical stock_sector.
policy.listing_keyed_review: Every row is keyed by listing_key and tied back to source_gap_classification/source_of_truth_decisions.
policy.b3_code_shape_review: Alphanumeric B3 issuer-code roots are preserved for probe diagnostics; no sector is inferred from the code shape.
